dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6136 IH: Protecting Union Representation and Elections Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fine (for himself and Mr. Harris of North Carolina) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 to require secret ballot elections of members for certain union officers.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting Union Representation and Elections Act or the PURE Act.

subsection.text: Section 401 of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 (29 U.S.C. 481) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking or at a convention of delegates chosen by secret ballot; and

paragraph.text: in subsection (d), by striking or by labor organization officers representative of such members who have been elected by secret ballot.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this Act shall take effect on the date that is 18 months after the date of enactment of this Act.
